column2: All domain events across core MVP + emotional layer  |  Generated: 2026-06-24

column5: Purpose

column2: GROUP: INGESTION — Signals entering the system

column5: Vector de-anonymizes a site visitor; first identity signal for a profile
HubSpot or owned form submission received; carries explicit self-reported fields
Clay or equivalent enrichment job kicked off for a profile or account
Enrichment payload returned and attached to profile as raw evidence
Canonical identity linking or merge evaluation started for raw visitor form or enrichment inputs
Identity candidates successfully linked to a canonical profile or account record
Identity candidates could not be safely merged and require manual resolution or downgrade
A source artifact (form field, transcript, enrichment blob) logged as an immutable evidence record
LIWC-style NLP pre-processing applied to free-text evidence; tags valence and arousal intensity

column2: GROUP: CLAIM — Assertions extracted and verified

column5: Atomic business assertion derived from evidence by rule or model; enters proposed status
Gate confirms claim against policy and corroborating evidence; status → verified
Conflicting evidence found; claim flagged as contradicted and blocked from downstream use
Freshness TTL exceeded or source retracted; claim status → stale, triggers re-verification
Reverification work item opened because a stale or disputed claim needs fresh evidence
Newer claim version replaces an older one while preserving lineage via supersedes relationship
SegmentDefinition rules evaluated for a profile or account whether or not membership changed
Profile moved into or out of a SegmentDefinition based on current verified claims
Inferred emotional response (fear, ecstasis, relief, outrage) logged from behavioral evidence
Profile moved into/out of emotional cohort track (e.g., High_Neuroticism_Fear_PAS)

column2: GROUP: ASSET — Content generation and tagging

column5: AI-generated or human-authored outbound asset (email, SMS, page) enters draft state
Emotional intent tag applied to asset variant (e.g., fear_PAS, ecstasis_future-pacing, relief_BAB)
Asset passes structured validation for required claims bindings policy version and composition integrity
Asset lifecycle status promoted to approved after required review or automated checks complete
Approved asset handed off for send publish or renderer activation
Human or compliance review checkpoint created for a claim asset segment or decision
Reviewer approves; unblocks downstream dispatch or claim promotion
Reviewer rejects; asset or claim returned to draft/proposed with reason codes
Reviewer escalates to another approver or policy owner due to risk ambiguity or exception handling

column2: GROUP: GATE & DISPATCH — Policy enforcement and delivery

column5: Applicable policy bundle evaluated against claims segment state and requested action
Gate blocks dispatch when asset emotional vector conflicts with profile arousal state or escalation cap
Gate substitutes a safer emotional vector (e.g., fear → relief) per Policy rule
Dispatch intentionally prevented due to policy frequency cap stale claims missing approval or channel restrictions
Asset sent to outbound channel (email SMS ad or renderer); final delivery handoff event
Delivery attempt failed at provider or channel boundary and may require retry or fallback
Chosen asset or variant recorded before dispatch so selection can be audited even if nothing is sent
Human or policy exception overrides an automated route segment or asset choice
Immutable record of why a route segment or asset was chosen at time T with specific claim evidence and policy versions

column2: Source: Provenance system architecture threads (Jun 2026) + emotional layer additions (Jun 20, 2026) + event completeness refinements (Jun 24, 2026)
